input_text: Bos aku memang suka buat kerja last minute, lepas tu salahkan staff bila tak siap. Bodoh betul management macam ni.
reason: Rudely insults management with name-calling over workplace frustration, crossing from valid complaint into personal attack.
suggested_rewrite: Pengurusan masa yang lemah dari pihak atasan boleh menjejaskan produktiviti pasukan. Perlu ada komunikasi yang lebih baik tentang tarikh akhir projek.

input_text: Rider Foodpanda ni memang pemalas. Order sejam lepas baru sampai, makanan dah sejuk. Tak guna langsung.
reason: Generalises all delivery riders as lazy over one negative experience, dismissing the challenges they face.
suggested_rewrite: Penghantaran lewat memang mengecewakan. Mungkin pihak platform perlu tambah baik sistem supaya rider dapat urus pesanan dengan lebih efisien.

input_text: Turis dari China ni memang biadab, mana-mana pergi bising je, tak reti jaga adab kat negara orang.
reason: Stereotypes Chinese tourists negatively as a group, using rude language that borders on xenophobia.
suggested_rewrite: Ada segelintir pelancong yang kurang peka dengan norma tempatan. Papan tanda dan panduan dalam pelbagai bahasa boleh membantu mereka menyesuaikan diri.

input_text: Mesyuarat majlis perbandaran tu buang masa je. Ahli-ahli dia datang tidur, makan free, balik. Tak ada hasil pun.
reason: Dismisses local council meetings entirely as useless, mocking elected representatives without constructive critique.
suggested_rewrite: Mesyuarat majlis perbandaran perlu lebih telus dan produktif. Rakyat berhak mengetahui hasil perbincangan dan tindakan susulan yang diambil.

input_text: Parking kat KL ni memang nak buat orang gila. Double park tak kena saman, tapi aku park betul-betul kena. Bangang betul sistem.
reason: Valid parking frustration expressed with vulgar language and sweeping attack on the enforcement system.
suggested_rewrite: Penguatkuasaan parking di KL perlu lebih konsisten. Mereka yang double park sepatutnya dikenakan saman sama seperti yang lain.

input_text: Sekolah kebangsaan sekarang memang teruk. Cikgu pun tak berkualiti, baik hantar anak ke sekolah swasta je.
reason: Dismisses national school teachers as low quality, disparaging the entire public education system.
suggested_rewrite: Kualiti pendidikan di sekolah kebangsaan memerlukan perhatian. Latihan guru yang lebih baik dan peruntukan yang mencukupi boleh meningkatkan tahap pendidikan.

input_text: Nak buat IC baru pun kena tunggu 3 bulan. Birokrasi Malaysia ni memang zaman batu. Orang kerja JPN tu goyang kaki je agaknya.
reason: Insults JPN staff as idle and labels Malaysian bureaucracy as primitive, going beyond legitimate complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Proses pengeluaran IC yang lama memerlukan penambahbaikan. Sistem digital dan penambahan kakitangan boleh mempercepatkan perkhidmatan di JPN.

input_text: Influencer Malaysia ni semua sama je, jual produk tak berkesan, bodek sponsor, content kosong. Menyampah aku tengok.
reason: Sweeping dismissal of all Malaysian influencers as dishonest and lacking substance.
suggested_rewrite: Sesetengah influencer perlu lebih bertanggungjawab dalam mempromosikan produk. Pengguna juga perlu bijak menilai kandungan yang mereka tonton.

input_text: Deepavali punya mercun bunyi macam perang dunia ketiga. Nak tidur pun tak boleh, orang sebelah rumah tak reti consider jiran ke?
reason: Specifically targets Deepavali celebrations with exaggerated complaint, potentially insensitive to Hindu festive traditions.
suggested_rewrite: Bunyi mercun yang berlebihan pada waktu malam boleh mengganggu kejiranan. Mungkin boleh ada persetujuan bersama tentang waktu yang sesuai untuk perayaan.

input_text: Projek MRT ni buat jalan sesak bertahun-tahun. Siap pun entah bila. Pembaziran duit rakyat je projek gajah putih macam ni.
reason: Labels major infrastructure as white elephant waste without acknowledging long-term benefits, stoking cynicism.
suggested_rewrite: Projek MRT memang menyebabkan kesesakan semasa pembinaan. Kerajaan perlu pastikan projek siap mengikut jadual supaya manfaatnya dapat dinikmati rakyat secepat mungkin.

input_text: HR department kat office ni hiasan je. Komplen pun tak ada follow up, baik buang je department tu.
reason: Dismisses entire HR department as decorative and useless, a rude generalisation of colleagues.
suggested_rewrite: Jabatan HR perlu lebih proaktif dalam menangani aduan pekerja. Tindakan susulan yang jelas boleh meningkatkan kepercayaan kakitangan.

input_text: Delivery rider lalu lorong belakang rumah macam Mat Rempit. Langgar kucing jiran hari tu, memang tak ada otak.
reason: Calls delivery riders brainless and compares them to Mat Rempit, a derogatory generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Sesetengah rider perlu lebih berhati-hati apabila melalui kawasan perumahan. Pihak platform boleh sediakan latihan keselamatan jalan raya untuk rider mereka.

input_text: Lepas ni turis Arab datang mesti sampah merata. Orang kaya tapi perangai macam tu, memang hairan.
reason: Stereotypes Arab tourists as litterbugs, making a dismissive and xenophobic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Kebersihan di kawasan pelancongan perlu dijaga oleh semua pihak. Penyediaan tong sampah yang mencukupi dan papan tanda boleh membantu.

input_text: YB kawasan aku datang masa pilihan raya je. Lepas menang, lenyap macam hantu. Mesyuarat pun tak pernah datang.
reason: Dismisses elected representative as vanishing after elections, using mocking tone rather than constructive feedback.
suggested_rewrite: Wakil rakyat perlu lebih kerap bertemu penduduk dan menghadiri mesyuarat. Rakyat berhak mendapat perkhidmatan yang konsisten dari wakil mereka.

input_text: Sekolah anak aku ni cikgu tukar setiap bulan. Macam mana budak nak belajar kalau cikgu pun tak tetap? Memang hopeless.
reason: Labels the school as hopeless, dismissing the educational institution without constructive engagement.
suggested_rewrite: Pertukaran guru yang kerap boleh menjejaskan pembelajaran murid. Kementerian perlu memastikan penempatan guru yang lebih stabil di sekolah.

input_text: Contractor buat jalan depan rumah tu memang kerja cincai. Dah kali ketiga turap, masih berlubang. Habis duit rakyat je.
reason: Accuses contractors of shoddy work with dismissive language, though based on legitimate infrastructure concern.
suggested_rewrite: Kualiti kerja pembinaan jalan perlu dipantau dengan lebih ketat. Pihak berkuasa tempatan perlu pastikan kontraktor mematuhi standard yang ditetapkan.

input_text: Nak renew lesen memandu pun kena ambil cuti sebab counter JPN buka waktu office je. Sistem bodoh betul.
reason: Uses vulgar language to criticise JPJ service hours, escalating a valid complaint into rudeness.
suggested_rewrite: Waktu operasi kaunter JPJ yang bertindih dengan waktu kerja menyukarkan rakyat. Pelanjutan waktu operasi atau perkhidmatan dalam talian boleh membantu.

input_text: Celebrity Malaysia ni semua fake je. Depan kamera baik, belakang tabir perangai macam samseng. Aku dah muak.
reason: Accuses all Malaysian celebrities of being fake and thuggish, a sweeping and rude generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Sesetengah selebriti mungkin menunjukkan imej yang berbeza di hadapan kamera. Penonton perlu bijak membezakan antara persona awam dan realiti.

input_text: Bunyi karaoke dari rumah jiran masa CNY sampai pukul 3 pagi. Memang takde adab langsung orang macam ni.
reason: Targets CNY celebrations specifically and calls neighbours ill-mannered, insensitive to cultural festivities.
suggested_rewrite: Perayaan memang masa untuk bergembira, tetapi bunyi bising pada lewat malam boleh mengganggu jiran. Komunikasi baik antara jiran boleh menyelesaikan isu ini.

input_text: Flyover baru tu dah ada retak baru setahun siap. Memang la Malaysia boleh. Duit masuk poket kroni je ni.
reason: Sarcastically mocks national motto while alleging cronyism without evidence, stoking distrust.
suggested_rewrite: Kerosakan awal pada infrastruktur baru perlu disiasat dengan teliti. Pihak berkuasa perlu memastikan kontraktor bertanggungjawab terhadap kualiti kerja mereka.

input_text: Supervisor aku ni memang power trip. Semua benda nak micromanage, tapi dia sendiri tak faham kerja. Menyusahkan orang je.
reason: Attacks supervisor personally with dismissive language rather than addressing the management style constructively.
suggested_rewrite: Gaya pengurusan yang terlalu mengawal boleh menjejaskan moral pekerja. Perbincangan terbuka tentang cara kerja yang lebih baik mungkin boleh membantu.

input_text: Rider GrabFood ni bawak motor macam nak mati. Orang jalan kaki pun kena takut. Satu hari mesti accident ni.
reason: Generalises all GrabFood riders as reckless with morbid exaggeration.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan jalan raya perlu diberi perhatian oleh semua pengguna jalan termasuk rider penghantaran. Kursus keselamatan wajib boleh membantu mengurangkan risiko kemalangan.

input_text: Turis backpacker ni datang Malaysia sebab murah je. Tapi perangai macam diorang punya negara, buat sepah je.
reason: Dismisses backpacker tourists as cheap and messy, a rude and xenophobic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia menarik ramai pelancong bajet dari seluruh dunia. Panduan etika perjalanan boleh membantu pelancong menghormati budaya dan kebersihan tempatan.

input_text: Kaunter pos office buka 3 je tapi queue sampai luar. Staff borak je dalam tu. Tak heran la orang marah.
reason: Accuses post office staff of chatting instead of working, a dismissive attack on workers.
suggested_rewrite: Kaunter perkhidmatan yang tidak mencukupi menyebabkan masa menunggu yang lama. Penambahan kaunter dan kakitangan boleh mengurangkan kesesakan.

input_text: Selebriti buat amal pun nak viral je. Sebenarnya nak show off je tu. Tolong orang tapi kena rakam dulu.
reason: Cynically dismisses celebrity charity as performative without acknowledging any genuine impact.
suggested_rewrite: Walaupun ada yang mempersoalkan niat selebriti beramal, impak bantuan tetap bermanfaat kepada penerima. Yang penting bantuan itu sampai kepada yang memerlukan.

input_text: These delivery riders think they own the road lah. Almost kena langgar twice today at the zebra crossing. Idiots.
reason: Calls delivery riders idiots, escalating a pedestrian safety concern into personal insult.
suggested_rewrite: I had two close calls with delivery riders at the zebra crossing today. Better enforcement of traffic rules at crossings is needed for pedestrian safety.

input_text: Local council meetings are such a joke. These people are just collecting their allowances and doing absolutely nothing for residents.
reason: Dismisses all council members as freeloaders without acknowledging any constructive work.
suggested_rewrite: Local council meetings need to produce more visible outcomes for residents. Greater transparency in meeting agendas and follow-up actions would build public trust.

input_text: Malaysian schools are honestly garbage. No wonder our students can't compete internationally. The whole education system is a failure.
reason: Labels entire education system as garbage and a failure, a sweeping and dismissive attack.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's education system faces challenges in international competitiveness. Targeted reforms in curriculum and teacher training could help improve student outcomes.

input_text: Government servants in Malaysia are the laziest bunch I've ever seen. Three-hour lunch breaks and still complain about workload.
reason: Stereotypes all government workers as lazy with exaggerated claims, disrespecting civil servants.
suggested_rewrite: Some government agencies could benefit from better productivity monitoring. Streamlined processes and accountability measures would improve public service delivery.

input_text: Influencers here are all scammers honestly. Promoting products they've never even used. Such clowns.
reason: Labels all influencers as scammers and clowns, a rude blanket accusation.
suggested_rewrite: Some influencers promote products without proper testing or disclosure. Stricter advertising standards and consumer awareness can help address this issue.

input_text: Festival season again and my whole neighbourhood sounds like a war zone. Can these people not celebrate without destroying everyone else's peace?
reason: Uses 'these people' to single out a community's festive celebration, dismissive of cultural traditions.
suggested_rewrite: Festival celebrations are important culturally, but loud noise late at night can affect neighbours. Mutual understanding and agreed quiet hours would benefit everyone.

input_text: This highway project has been going on for five years and all we got is more traffic. Typical Malaysian efficiency. What a waste.
reason: Sarcastically mocks Malaysian efficiency as a whole, generalising from one infrastructure project.
suggested_rewrite: The prolonged highway construction has caused significant inconvenience. Clear timelines and regular progress updates from authorities would help manage public expectations.

input_text: My boss literally takes credit for everything we do. Useless manager who just knows how to play politics. Disgusting.
reason: Calls boss useless and disgusting, crossing from valid frustration into personal insult.
suggested_rewrite: When managers take credit for team work, it demotivates staff. Organisations should have systems that recognise individual contributions fairly.

input_text: Parking enforcement in this city is a complete joke. Summon the wrong people while actual offenders roam free. Bunch of clowns.
reason: Calls parking enforcers clowns, going beyond critique of inconsistency into name-calling.
suggested_rewrite: Inconsistent parking enforcement undermines public trust. A more systematic and fair approach to issuing summons would address legitimate complaints.

input_text: Tourists from certain countries really have no manners at all. Spitting everywhere, cutting queues. Go back to your own country if you can't behave.
reason: Tells tourists to go back to their country, a xenophobic dismissal that targets nationality-based groups.
suggested_rewrite: Some tourists may not be aware of local etiquette. Clear signage and friendly reminders in multiple languages can help promote respectful behaviour.

input_text: Went to renew my passport and wasted my entire day. The JPJ staff move at snail pace. No wonder people hate dealing with government agencies.
reason: Mocks government staff as snail-paced and generalises hatred of agencies from one experience.
suggested_rewrite: Long wait times for passport renewals can be frustrating. Online appointment systems and more efficient processes would improve the experience for everyone.

input_text: Malaysian celebrities think they're Hollywood stars. Same recycled content, zero talent, just pretty faces and sponsors. Pathetic.
reason: Dismisses all Malaysian celebrities as talentless and pathetic, a rude sweeping judgement.
suggested_rewrite: The Malaysian entertainment industry would benefit from more diverse and original content. Supporting talented creators beyond the mainstream could enrich the scene.

input_text: Every CNY the fireworks go on till 4am. Some of us have work the next day. Zero consideration from these people.
reason: Uses 'these people' to single out a Chinese festive community, dismissive phrasing that can be read as communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Late-night fireworks during festive seasons can be disruptive for those with early work schedules. Community guidelines on appropriate hours for fireworks would help balance celebration and rest.

input_text: The new LRT extension is the biggest waste of taxpayer money. Who even uses public transport in Malaysia? Only people who can't afford cars.
reason: Stigmatises public transport users as poor and dismisses infrastructure investment cynically.
suggested_rewrite: Public transport investment should be matched with better connectivity and service quality to increase ridership across all income groups.

input_text: School teachers nowadays just read from textbooks. No passion, no creativity. And they wonder why kids hate school.
reason: Generalises all teachers as uninspired and passionless, disrespecting the profession.
suggested_rewrite: Teaching methods that go beyond textbooks can make learning more engaging. Supporting teachers with better training and resources would benefit students and educators alike.

input_text: Grab riders speeding through my taman like it's a race track. One day someone will get hurt and then only they'll learn. Morons.
reason: Calls riders morons and wishes for an accident as a learning moment, rude and insensitive.
suggested_rewrite: Speeding through residential areas is a serious safety concern. Speed bumps and community awareness campaigns could help prevent accidents before they happen.

input_text: Malaysia's bureaucracy makes me want to scream. Everything needs 10 forms, 5 stamps, and three months of waiting. Absolutely brain-dead system.
reason: Labels the entire bureaucratic system as brain-dead, using offensive language for a legitimate frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Reducing paperwork and streamlining approval processes would greatly improve government service delivery. Digital solutions could cut waiting times significantly.

input_text: Local councillors are honestly the most useless public servants. Can't even fix a pothole but expect us to pay taxes. Scam artists.
reason: Calls councillors scam artists and useless, an insulting generalisation of public servants.
suggested_rewrite: Residents expect basic maintenance like pothole repair from their local councils. Better reporting mechanisms and accountability would improve service delivery.

input_text: Why do influencers always have to show off their sponsored trips? Nobody cares about your free hotel stay. Get a real job.
reason: Dismisses influencing as not a real job and rudely tells them nobody cares, personal and snarky.
suggested_rewrite: Content creation is a legitimate career, though excessive sponsored content can feel inauthentic. A balance between sponsored and genuine content would be more engaging for audiences.

input_text: Parking in Penang is an absolute nightmare. Double-parked cars everywhere and zero enforcement. This city is going downhill fast.
reason: Declares an entire city is going downhill based on parking issues, an exaggerated and dismissive statement.
suggested_rewrite: Parking management in Penang needs significant improvement. Stricter enforcement against double parking and more public parking options would help ease congestion.

input_text: These backpacker tourists treat Malaysia like their personal playground. Cheap beer, cheap food, and they leave a mess everywhere. Have some respect.
reason: Stereotypes backpacker tourists as disrespectful cheapskates, a xenophobic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Tourism brings economic benefits, but responsible tourism should be promoted. Clear guidelines for visitors on respecting local customs and cleanliness would be helpful.

input_text: Road construction in front of my house for 8 months now. No signboard, no timeline, no nothing. Typical la our government efficiency.
reason: Sarcastically mocks government efficiency as a whole based on one construction project.
suggested_rewrite: Prolonged road construction without clear communication is frustrating for residents. Contractors should be required to display project timelines and provide regular updates.

input_text: HR at my company is a total waste of space. They only exist to protect the company, not the employees. Don't even bother complaining to them.
reason: Calls HR a waste of space and discourages others from using proper channels, dismissive and unhelpful.
suggested_rewrite: HR departments should serve both company and employee interests. If internal complaints aren't addressed, employees can seek guidance from the Labour Department.

input_text: Festival noise in Malaysia is out of control. Speakers blasting religious songs at 5am and nobody dares complain because 'sensitivity'. Ridiculous.
reason: Dismisses religious observance as mere noise and mocks sensitivity concerns, potentially provocative.
suggested_rewrite: Balancing religious observance with community peace is important. Local authorities can work with religious communities to set reasonable guidelines on sound levels and timing.

input_text: 这些外卖骑手骑摩托简直是不要命。差点撞到我小孩，真的是没脑子的人。
reason: Calls delivery riders brainless, escalating a safety concern into a personal insult against all riders.
suggested_rewrite: 外卖骑手在住宅区应更注意安全。平台公司可以加强对骑手的交通安全培训，保护行人尤其是儿童的安全。

input_text: 市议会开会就是浪费时间。那些议员只会吃喝，什么问题都解决不了。真的是白拿薪水。
reason: Dismisses all council members as useless freeloaders, rude generalisation of elected officials.
suggested_rewrite: 市议会需要更透明的会议记录和跟进行动。市民有权了解议会决策如何影响他们的日常生活。

input_text: 马来西亚的学校越来越差了。老师素质低，教学方法落后，难怪孩子都学不好。
reason: Labels all teachers as low quality and schools as declining, a sweeping insult to the education system.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚的教育系统需要持续改进。加强教师培训和更新教学方法可以帮助提升整体教学质量。

input_text: 政府办事效率真的是慢到要死。办个手续等三个月，公务员都在干嘛？喝茶聊天吗？
reason: Accuses all civil servants of idling and being inefficient, a mocking and rude characterisation.
suggested_rewrite: 行政手续的处理时间需要缩短。推行数字化服务和优化流程可以有效提升政府办事效率。

input_text: 网红就是骗子，卖的东西都是垃圾，只会忽悠粉丝买。这些人真的没有良心。
reason: Labels all influencers as conscience-less scammers, a rude and sweeping accusation.
suggested_rewrite: 消费者应该对网红推荐的产品保持警惕。相关部门应加强对网络营销的监管，保护消费者权益。

input_text: 过年放鞭炮到凌晨三四点，吵死了。这些人只顾自己开心，完全不考虑别人。自私。
reason: Calls CNY celebrants selfish for late-night fireworks, dismissive of cultural traditions.
suggested_rewrite: 节日庆祝是重要的文化传统，但深夜的鞭炮声可能会影响邻居休息。社区可以商讨适当的燃放时间，兼顾庆祝和休息。

input_text: 停车位不够就算了，还乱开罚单。执法人员真的是只会欺负老百姓。
reason: Accuses all enforcement officers of bullying ordinary people, a rude generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: 停车位不足和执法不一致的问题需要同时解决。增加公共停车设施和公平执法能让市民更满意。

input_text: 大马的高速公路修了又修，修了又坏。是不是故意做烂的好可以一直拿合同赚钱？
reason: Implies deliberate corruption in road maintenance without evidence, stoking distrust.
suggested_rewrite: 高速公路频繁维修让人质疑工程质量。严格的质量监控和公开招标可以确保道路建设的长期可靠性。

input_text: 那些游客来到这里什么都嫌便宜，态度还那么差。看不起我们本地人是吧。
reason: Assumes all tourists look down on locals, a defensive and xenophobic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: 跨文化交流有时会产生误解。提升旅游服务水平的同时，也可以通过多语言指南帮助游客更好地了解本地文化。

input_text: 公司老板只会画大饼，说什么年底加薪，结果年年都是空话。骗子一个。
reason: Calls boss a liar over unfulfilled salary promises, personal insult rather than constructive complaint.
suggested_rewrite: 公司应该兑现对员工的承诺。如果薪资调整迟迟未落实，员工可以通过正式渠道与管理层沟通或寻求劳工部门的建议。

input_text: 马来西亚的明星就会炒作。没有真本事，就靠绯闻上热搜。低级。
reason: Dismisses all Malaysian celebrities as low-class and talentless, a rude blanket judgement.
suggested_rewrite: 娱乐圈应更注重实力和内容质量。观众也可以选择支持有才华的艺人，推动行业正面发展。

input_text: 学校里的厕所脏到不能用，食堂的食物也难吃得要命。这种学校还敢收费？
reason: Exaggerates school facility problems with contemptuous tone, dismissing the institution entirely.
suggested_rewrite: 学校的卫生设施和食堂质量直接影响学生的学习体验。家长可以向校方反映，推动改善学校环境。

input_text: 快递员把包裹随便丢在门口，下雨都不管。这种服务态度，真的是废物。
reason: Calls delivery workers trash over a service complaint, dehumanising language.
suggested_rewrite: 快递员应该更妥善地放置包裹，尤其是在恶劣天气时。快递公司可以制定更清晰的投递规范来提升服务质量。

input_text: 办公室里的同事每天就知道八卦，工作一点都不做。这种人真是公司的蛀虫。
reason: Calls colleagues parasites for gossiping, dehumanising insult in a workplace context.
suggested_rewrite: 工作效率受闲聊影响时可以与主管沟通。营造专注的工作环境对团队整体表现更有帮助。

input_text: டெலிவரி ரைடர்கள் சாலையில் பைத்தியம் மாதிரி ஓட்டுறாங்க. யாருக்காவது அடிச்சா தான் கற்றுக்குவாங்க போல.
reason: Calls delivery riders crazy and implies they need an accident to learn, rude and insensitive.
suggested_rewrite: டெலிவரி ரைடர்கள் சாலை பாதுகாப்பு விதிகளை பின்பற்ற வேண்டும். நிறுவனங்கள் பாதுகாப்பு பயிற்சியை கட்டாயமாக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: உள்ளூர் கவுன்சில் கூட்டம் வெறும் நாடகம். எந்த பிரச்சனையும் தீர்க்க மாட்டாங்க, சம்பளம் மட்டும் வாங்குவாங்க.
reason: Dismisses local council meetings as pure drama and members as salary collectors, rude and cynical.
suggested_rewrite: உள்ளூர் கவுன்சில் கூட்டங்களின் முடிவுகள் வெளிப்படையாக பகிரப்பட வேண்டும். குடிமக்கள் பங்கேற்பை ஊக்குவிப்பது நல்ல முடிவுகளை எடுக்க உதவும்.

input_text: பள்ளி ஆசிரியர்கள் இப்போ சரியா கற்பிக்கவே மாட்டாங்க. புத்தகத்தை படிச்சு காட்டுறதுதான் கற்பித்தல்னு நினைக்குறாங்க. பரிதாபம்.
reason: Labels all teachers as pitiful and incompetent, disrespecting the entire profession.
suggested_rewrite: ஆசிரியர்கள் புதுமையான கற்பித்தல் முறைகளை பயன்படுத்த ஊக்குவிக்கப்பட வேண்டும். தொடர்ச்சியான பயிற்சி மற்றும் வளங்கள் இதற்கு உதவும்.

input_text: அரசாங்க அலுவலகத்தில் ஒரு வேலை முடிக்க மூன்று மாசம் ஆகுது. ஊழியர்கள் என்ன செய்றாங்கன்னே தெரியல. சோம்பேறிங்க.
reason: Calls all government workers lazy, a rude generalisation over bureaucratic delays.
suggested_rewrite: அரசாங்க சேவைகளின் நேரத்தை குறைக்க டிஜிட்டல் முறைகள் அறிமுகப்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும். ஊழியர்களுக்கு போதுமான ஆதரவும் வளங்களும் வழங்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்த செலிபிரிட்டிகள் எல்லாம் போலி. கேமராவுக்கு முன்னாடி ஒரு மாதிரி, பின்னாடி வேற மாதிரி. வெட்கக்கேடு.
reason: Calls all celebrities fake and shameful, a sweeping insulting generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: பொழுதுபோக்கு துறையில் நம்பகத்தன்மை முக்கியம். பிரபலங்கள் தங்கள் தாக்கத்தை உணர்ந்து நேர்மையான முன்மாதிரியாக இருக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: பண்டிகை நேரத்தில் பட்டாசு சத்தம் தாங்க முடியல. இவங்களுக்கு மத்தவங்க பத்தி கொஞ்சமும் அக்கறை இல்ல. சுயநலம்.
reason: Labels festival celebrants as selfish, potentially targeting a specific community's cultural practices.
suggested_rewrite: பண்டிகை கொண்டாட்டங்கள் முக்கியம், ஆனால் இரவு நேர சத்தம் அக்கம்பக்கத்தினரை பாதிக்கலாம். சமூக புரிந்துணர்வுடன் கொண்டாட்ட நேரங்களை நிர்ணயிக்கலாம்.

input_text: பார்க்கிங் பிரச்சனை இந்த நகரத்தில் மோசமா இருக்கு. டபுள் பார்க் பண்றவங்களுக்கு எந்த நடவடிக்கையும் இல்ல. அதிகாரிகள் எல்லாம் தூங்குறாங்க.
reason: Accuses all enforcement officers of sleeping on the job, a rude dismissal.
suggested_rewrite: டபுள் பார்க்கிங் மீதான கடுமையான நடவடிக்கைகள் தேவை. போதுமான பார்க்கிங் வசதிகள் மற்றும் சரியான அமலாக்கம் இந்த பிரச்சனையை தீர்க்கும்.

input_text: சாலை வேலை ஒரு வருடமா நடக்குது, இன்னும் முடியல. கான்ட்ராக்டர் எல்லாம் லூட்டி அடிக்குறாங்க, அவ்வளவுதான்.
reason: Accuses all contractors of looting without evidence, stoking distrust in infrastructure projects.
suggested_rewrite: நீண்ட நாட்களாக முடிக்கப்படாத சாலை பணிகள் மக்களுக்கு சிரமம் தருகிறது. திட்ட காலக்கெடு மற்றும் தர கண்காணிப்பு கடுமையாக பின்பற்றப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: டூரிஸ்ட்கள் வந்தா எல்லா இடமும் நிறைய குப்பை. இவங்க சொந்த நாட்டிலும் இப்படித்தானா? மரியாதையே இல்ல.
reason: Stereotypes all tourists as disrespectful litterbugs, a xenophobic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: சுற்றுலா பகுதிகளில் சுத்தத்தை பராமரிக்க அதிக குப்பைத்தொட்டிகள் மற்றும் பல மொழிகளில் வழிகாட்டுதல் பலகைகள் உதவும்.

input_text: ஆபிஸ்ல மேனேஜர் எல்லாருக்கும் பேவரிட்டிசம் காட்டுறார். சில பேருக்கு எதுவும் செஞ்சாலும் தண்டனை இல்ல. அநீதி.
reason: Accuses manager of favouritism in a dismissive way without constructive approach to resolution.
suggested_rewrite: நிர்வாகத்தில் சமத்துவம் முக்கியம். விதிகள் அனைவருக்கும் சமமாக பொருந்த வேண்டும். HR மூலம் முறையான புகார் அளிக்கலாம்.

input_text: Apasal la rider ni hantar makanan lambat sangat, lepas tu food all soggy already. Memang useless these people.
reason: Calls delivery riders useless in mixed Malay-English, generalising from one bad delivery experience.
suggested_rewrite: Penghantaran makanan yang lambat memang mengecewakan. Platform boleh improve packaging guidelines supaya makanan sampai dalam keadaan baik.

input_text: Council meeting hari tu memang waste time gila. Yang datang pun half asleep, pastu wonder why nothing gets done. Bodoh.
reason: Calls council members stupid and sleepy, dismissive insult mixed with legitimate frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Council meetings should have clear agendas and measurable outcomes. Rakyat berhak tahu apa yang dibincangkan dan tindakan yang diambil.

input_text: Tourist from Europe ingat Malaysia ni murah sangat, bargain habis kat pasar malam. Cheapskate betul orang macam ni.
reason: Labels European tourists as cheapskates, a rude stereotype targeting a group by origin.
suggested_rewrite: Tawar-menawar adalah budaya pasar malam Malaysia, tapi peniaga juga perlu letak harga yang fair. Clear pricing boleh reduce misunderstandings antara penjual dan pembeli.

input_text: Parking kat shopping mall ni memang designed by orang yang tak pernah drive. Sempit gila, every time sure kena scratch. Hopeless design.
reason: Insults the designers as non-drivers and labels the design as hopeless, rude personal attack.
suggested_rewrite: Reka bentuk parking lot di shopping mall perlu lebih spacious and user-friendly. Feedback dari pengguna boleh membantu architect improve design untuk keselesaan semua.

input_text: Sekolah budak aku ni cikgu semua unmotivated. Asyik MC je, students belajar sendiri. What kind of education system is this?
reason: Accuses all teachers of being unmotivated and taking excessive MC, a rude and unfair generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Ketidakhadiran guru yang kerap boleh menjejaskan pembelajaran murid. Pihak sekolah perlu ensure adequate teacher coverage dan address root causes of absenteeism.

input_text: Nak renew roadtax pun kena queue berjam-jam. Online system crash every time. Government IT memang level kampung.
reason: Mocks government IT as village-level, a dismissive and rude characterisation of digital services.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem dalam talian kerajaan perlu lebih stabil dan reliable. Investment in better IT infrastructure boleh reduce queue times dan improve user experience.

input_text: Influencer Malaysia ni semua sama je. Jual skincare tah apa-apa brand, followers pun beli macam lembu. Both sides equally dumb.
reason: Calls both influencers and their followers dumb and compares followers to cattle, doubly insulting.
suggested_rewrite: Pengguna perlu lebih berhati-hati dengan produk yang dipromosikan oleh influencer. Regulatory bodies should ensure all sponsored content meets advertising standards.

input_text: CNY fireworks kali ni gila babi. Rumah aku getar macam earthquake. These people don't care about others punya rest time.
reason: Uses offensive language (gila babi) and singles out CNY celebrations with 'these people', potentially communally hostile.
suggested_rewrite: Perayaan Tahun Baru Cina memang meriah, tapi bunyi bunga api yang terlalu kuat boleh mengganggu. Community guidelines on appropriate timing boleh help balance celebration dan keselesaan jiran.

input_text: Road repair depan office aku dah 6 bulan, still not done. Contractor makan duit je kerja. Typical la Malaysian infrastructure.
reason: Accuses contractors of corruption and labels all Malaysian infrastructure as typically poor.
suggested_rewrite: Projek pembaikan jalan yang berlarutan perlu dipantau dengan lebih ketat. Transparent project timelines dan quality audits boleh ensure value for money.

input_text: Boss aku ni memang toxic. Suruh kerja overtime every day tapi bonus takde. Exploitation namanya tu. Manusia macam ni patut kena karma.
reason: Wishes karma on the boss, crossing from valid labour complaint into personal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Pekerja yang diminta kerja overtime tanpa pampasan sewajarnya boleh membuat aduan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja. Hak pekerja dilindungi di bawah undang-undang buruh Malaysia.

input_text: Celebrity Malaysia buat charity event pun nak selfie dulu. Content first, ikhlas belakang. Menyampah tengok perangai macam ni.
reason: Cynically dismisses all celebrity charity as insincere content creation, rude and judgemental.
suggested_rewrite: Walaupun ada perdebatan tentang keikhlasan, celebrity charity events tetap memberi impak positif. Yang penting bantuan sampai kepada yang memerlukan regardless of publicity.

input_text: Grab rider potong queue kat traffic light, almost hit my car. These riders memang think they own the road. Bangang.
reason: Uses vulgar language to insult all riders based on one incident, rude and generalising.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan di jalan raya memerlukan semua pengguna mematuhi peraturan. Platform e-hailing boleh strengthen safety protocols dan rider accountability.

input_text: Majlis perbandaran kutip cukai pintu tapi service zero. Longkang tersumbat, lampu jalan rosak. What are we even paying for?
reason: Claims council services are zero despite collecting taxes, a dismissive exaggeration.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat expect basic services like drain maintenance dan street lighting dari cukai yang dibayar. Sistem aduan yang efisien boleh help majlis perbandaran prioritise repairs.

input_text: Backpacker turis ni datang Malaysia minum arak murah je kerja. Buat malu kat Langkawi, vomit everywhere. Disgusting people.
reason: Labels backpackers as disgusting based on alcohol tourism, xenophobic and dehumanising generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Pelancongan yang bertanggungjawab perlu digalakkan di Langkawi. Penguatkuasaan yang lebih baik terhadap penyalahgunaan alkohol di tempat awam boleh jaga imej destinasi.

input_text: Nak complaint kat KPDNHEP pun form satu mile panjang. By the time siap, dah malas nak complain. System designed to discourage complaints ke?
reason: Implies the complaint system is deliberately designed to deter complainants, a cynical accusation.
suggested_rewrite: Proses aduan pengguna perlu dipermudahkan. KPDNHEP boleh introduce simplified online forms dan faster response times untuk galakkan rakyat melaporkan masalah.

input_text: Kerja overtime sampai malam tapi bos tak pernah appreciate. Cakap 'that's your job'. Memang heartless management macam ni.
reason: Calls management heartless, crossing from valid overtime frustration into personal attack.
suggested_rewrite: Pengiktirafan terhadap usaha pekerja sangat penting untuk moral. Pihak pengurusan yang menghargai overtime staff akan dapat loyalty dan productivity yang lebih baik.

input_text: Delivery service kat Malaysia ni memang worst in Southeast Asia. Barang pecah, late delivery, lost parcel. Semua problem ada.
reason: Labels Malaysia's delivery service as the worst in the region, a sweeping and unsubstantiated claim.
suggested_rewrite: Perkhidmatan penghantaran di Malaysia boleh diperbaiki dari segi packaging, timeliness dan tracking. Competition antara syarikat boleh drive improvement in service quality.

input_text: Jalan kat taman ni dah bertahun rosak. Report kat council banyak kali, still nothing. These people memang makan gaji buta.
reason: Accuses council workers of drawing salary for nothing, an insulting idiom implying total incompetence.
suggested_rewrite: Pembaikan jalan yang berulang kali dilaporkan tapi tidak diambil tindakan sangat mengecewakan. Escalation melalui wakil rakyat atau media sosial boleh help speed up the process.

input_text: Budak sekolah sekarang belajar dalam kelas pun macam kat pasar. Discipline langsung takde. Teacher pun dah give up agaknya.
reason: Mocks students and implies teachers have given up, disrespectful to both.
suggested_rewrite: Disiplin dalam kelas memerlukan kerjasama antara guru, ibu bapa dan pelajar. Programs yang strengthen classroom management skills boleh membantu create better learning environment.

input_text: Deepavali firecrackers in my neighbourhood sampai pukul 2 pagi. I have work tomorrow la. Some people memang inconsiderate habis.
reason: Specifically targets Deepavali celebrations and labels celebrants as inconsiderate, insensitive to Hindu traditions.
suggested_rewrite: Deepavali is an important celebration, tapi bunyi mercun lewat malam boleh affect jiran yang perlu bekerja keesokan hari. Persetujuan bersama tentang waktu yang sesuai boleh help semua pihak.

input_text: Datang KWSP office nak check status, staff suruh tunggu 2 jam. Yang buat kerja satu counter je. Memang sengaja buat orang suffer.
reason: Accuses KWSP staff of deliberately making people suffer, an unfair and hostile assumption.
suggested_rewrite: Masa menunggu yang lama di pejabat KWSP boleh dikurangkan dengan menambah kaunter beroperasi dan memperkenalkan sistem temujanji dalam talian.

input_text: Kolam renang awam dah lama rosak tapi duit cukai kutip je. Majlis daerah ni memang curi duit rakyat.
reason: Accuses the district council of stealing public funds without evidence, a serious and rude allegation.
suggested_rewrite: Kemudahan awam seperti kolam renang perlu diselenggara dengan baik. Rakyat boleh meminta laporan perbelanjaan dari majlis daerah untuk memastikan ketelusan.

input_text: Pekerja kat klinik kerajaan ni memang sombong. Tanya soalan sikit pun macam kita ni menganggu dia. Service langsung takde.
reason: Generalises all government clinic staff as arrogant and service-less, a rude blanket statement.
suggested_rewrite: Layanan mesra di klinik kerajaan sangat penting untuk keselesaan pesakit. Latihan khidmat pelanggan yang berterusan boleh meningkatkan pengalaman pesakit.

input_text: Cikgu kat sekolah rendah anak aku ajar main phone je dalam kelas. Patut la result teruk. Cikgu macam ni patut dipecat.
reason: Calls for teacher dismissal based on a single observation, rude and personally targeted.
suggested_rewrite: Jika guru menggunakan telefon semasa mengajar, ibu bapa boleh melaporkan kepada pihak sekolah untuk tindakan susulan. Dialog terbuka antara guru dan ibu bapa penting untuk pendidikan anak.

input_text: Orang nak buat bisnes kat Malaysia ni memang payah. Lesen satu, permit satu, duit kopi lagi. Semua nak sapu.
reason: Implies widespread bribery in business licensing without evidence, cynically dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: Proses perlesenan perniagaan di Malaysia perlu dipermudahkan. Usahawan boleh melaporkan sebarang permintaan rasuah kepada SPRM untuk tindakan.

input_text: Jiran aku buat renovation sampai pukul 10 malam. Report kat majlis perbandaran, jawapan dia 'kami akan semak'. Semak kepala hotak.
reason: Uses crude insult to express frustration with council response, rude and vulgar.
suggested_rewrite: Kerja pengubahsuaian di luar waktu yang dibenarkan perlu dikuatkuasakan. Majlis perbandaran patut memberi respons yang jelas dan tindakan segera terhadap aduan bunyi bising.

input_text: Artis Malaysia ni asyik recycle drama yang sama je. Plot bodoh, lakonan kayu. Industri hiburan kita memang tak ada harapan.
reason: Calls acting wooden and plots stupid, dismissing the entire entertainment industry as hopeless.
suggested_rewrite: Industri hiburan Malaysia boleh diperkayakan dengan skrip yang lebih kreatif dan pelbagai. Sokongan kepada penulis dan pengarah baru boleh membawa kelainan dalam produksi tempatan.

input_text: Delivery J&T ni memang teruk. Barang fragile pun campak macam batu bata. Memang orang tak ada perasaan kerja situ.
reason: Calls J&T workers heartless, dehumanising employees over a package handling complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Pengendalian barangan fragile memerlukan perhatian khusus. Syarikat kurier perlu melatih pekerja tentang prosedur pengendalian yang betul dan menyediakan pembungkusan yang sesuai.

input_text: Nak claim insurance kat EPF pun susah macam nak panjat gunung. Borang bertimbun, proses berbulan. Orang dah desperate, sistem pula buat susah.
reason: Exaggerates the difficulty and implies the system deliberately causes hardship, cynical and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: Proses tuntutan di KWSP perlu dipermudahkan terutama untuk kes yang mendesak. Sistem dalam talian yang lebih mesra pengguna boleh membantu mempercepatkan proses.

input_text: Mat Salleh tourists think they can bargain like crazy at Petaling Street. Dah la murah, nak lagi murah. Kedekut gila.
reason: Uses 'Mat Salleh' pejoratively and calls Western tourists extremely stingy, a xenophobic stereotype.
suggested_rewrite: Tawar-menawar adalah sebahagian daripada pengalaman membeli-belah di Petaling Street. Peniaga boleh letak harga tetap untuk mengelakkan salah faham dengan pelancong.

input_text: These Chinese tourists damn noisy at the hotel. Talking so loud at 6am in the corridor. Don't they have basic manners or what?
reason: Singles out Chinese tourists for rudeness, a xenophobic generalisation about an entire nationality.
suggested_rewrite: Early morning noise in hotel corridors can disturb other guests. Hotels should provide multilingual reminders about quiet hours to all guests regardless of nationality.

input_text: Malaysian government websites look like they were designed in 2005. No wonder nobody wants to use e-services. Total embarrassment.
reason: Calls government websites a total embarrassment, mocking rather than constructively critiquing.
suggested_rewrite: Government websites could benefit from modern UX design updates to encourage e-service adoption. Investing in user-friendly digital platforms would improve public engagement.

input_text: My colleague always comes late but boss never says anything because she's pretty. This office runs on favouritism, not merit. Joke company.
reason: Implies colleague gets special treatment for looks, demeaning both the colleague and management.
suggested_rewrite: Consistent enforcement of attendance policies is important for workplace fairness. If there are concerns about unequal treatment, they can be raised through proper HR channels.

input_text: Datang JPJ nak settle saman, the officer literally rolling eyes at me. Government workers and their attitude problem, I swear.
reason: Generalises all government workers as having attitude problems based on one encounter.
suggested_rewrite: Customer service training for frontline government staff can significantly improve public experience. Feedback channels should be easily accessible for residents to report both positive and negative interactions.

input_text: 明星上综艺节目就会装可爱，演技比路边摊还假。看了就恶心，浪费观众时间。
reason: Calls celebrity performances nauseating and faker than street stalls, a contemptuous dismissal.
suggested_rewrite: 综艺节目需要更真实的互动来吸引观众。制作方可以设计更能展现嘉宾真实一面的环节。

input_text: 停车场收费越来越贵，服务越来越差。管理公司就是吸血鬼，只知道涨价。
reason: Calls parking management companies vampires, dehumanising language for a pricing complaint.
suggested_rewrite: 停车费涨价应该伴随服务质量的提升。消费者可以向相关部门反映不合理的收费情况。

input_text: 办公室的空调坏了一个月都没人修。跟管理层说了好多次，他们只会推来推去。一群饭桶。
reason: Calls management rice buckets (useless people), a demeaning insult over a maintenance issue.
suggested_rewrite: 办公室设施维护应该及时处理。员工可以通过书面投诉或工会渠道正式提出维修请求，以确保问题得到解决。

input_text: Bos suruh present tapi dia sendiri tak baca slides. Last-last reject sebab 'tak cukup info'. Geram betul dengan orang macam ni, waste everyone's time.
reason: Attacks boss personally for not reading slides, crossing from frustration to personal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Untuk presentation yang lebih productive, pre-reading materials boleh diedarkan awal. Clear feedback criteria sebelum presentation boleh save masa semua pihak.

input_text: DBKL punya drainage system memang design by monkeys. Hujan sikit je dah banjir everywhere. Duit rakyat pergi mana?
reason: Says drainage was designed by monkeys, a dehumanising insult aimed at engineers and officials.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem saliran DBKL perlu dinaik taraf untuk menangani hujan lebat. Investment in modern drainage infrastructure dan regular maintenance boleh kurangkan risiko banjir kilat.

input_text: Hari Raya punya bunga api sampai pukul 4 pagi. Non-Muslim neighbours like us cannot sleep la. Every year same story, nobody cares.
reason: Frames Hari Raya celebrations as inconsiderate specifically towards non-Muslims, creating a communal divide.
suggested_rewrite: Perayaan Hari Raya memang meriah, tapi bunga api lewat malam boleh affect semua jiran. Open communication antara jiran dan community guidelines on timing boleh help everyone enjoy the celebration.

input_text: Aku punya company IT department memang tak guna. Simple password reset pun ambil 3 hari. Orang kerja situ tidur ke?
reason: Calls IT department useless and implies they sleep on the job, a rude workplace generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Jabatan IT perlu mempunyai SLA yang jelas untuk permintaan asas seperti reset kata laluan. Sistem tiket automatik boleh mempercepatkan proses penyelesaian isu.

input_text: Kedai makan kat food court ni makin mahal tapi portion makin kecil. Peniaga sekarang memang tamak haloba semua.
reason: Labels all food court operators as greedy, an unfair sweeping judgement of small business owners.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan harga makanan perlu seimbang dengan saiz hidangan. Peniaga menghadapi kos bahan mentah yang tinggi, tetapi ketelusan harga boleh membantu pengguna membuat pilihan yang bijak.

input_text: Pengangkutan awam kat Malaysia ni memang third world. Bas tak on time, LRT selalu rosak. Malu nak compare dengan Singapura.
reason: Labels Malaysian public transport as third world, a demeaning comparison that insults the nation.
suggested_rewrite: Penambahbaikan pengangkutan awam perlu diberi keutamaan. Peningkatan kekerapan perkhidmatan dan penyelenggaraan berkala boleh meningkatkan kebolehpercayaan sistem transit.

input_text: Jiran sebelah buat kenduri kahwin block jalan satu kampung. Nak keluar rumah pun tak boleh. Selfish gila orang macam ni.
reason: Calls neighbours extremely selfish for a wedding, dismissive of cultural celebration norms.
suggested_rewrite: Kenduri kahwin memang penting dalam budaya kita, tetapi perlu pastikan laluan jalan tidak terhalang sepenuhnya. Pemberitahuan awal kepada jiran dan perancangan parking boleh membantu.

input_text: Rider Lalamove bawak lori macam dia sorang je atas jalan. Signal tak letak, potong line sesuka hati. Bahaya gila.
reason: Generalises Lalamove drivers as dangerous and inconsiderate, a rude blanket statement.
suggested_rewrite: Pemandu kenderaan komersial perlu mematuhi peraturan jalan raya dengan ketat. Syarikat logistik patut menyediakan latihan pemanduan defensif kepada pemandu mereka.

input_text: Dewan serbaguna kawasan aku buat semak samun je. Majlis tak jaga langsung. Bayar cukai tinggi tapi fasiliti macam hutan.
reason: Exaggerates neglect by comparing facilities to jungle, dismissive of council efforts.
suggested_rewrite: Kemudahan awam seperti dewan serbaguna perlu diselenggara dengan baik. Penduduk boleh buat laporan rasmi dan minta kemas kini tentang jadual penyelenggaraan dari majlis.

input_text: Pergi LHDN nak declare tax pun staff layan macam aku ni penjenayah. Muka masam, jawab soalan pun malas. Service teruk.
reason: Generalises LHDN staff as rude and lazy, extending one experience to the whole department.
suggested_rewrite: Layanan mesra di kaunter LHDN penting untuk menggalakkan pematuhan cukai. Latihan perkhidmatan pelanggan dan sistem maklum balas boleh meningkatkan pengalaman pembayar cukai.

input_text: The security guards at my condo are totally useless. Always sleeping at the guardhouse. What's the point of paying maintenance fees?
reason: Calls security guards totally useless and accuses them of always sleeping, a rude generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Security performance at condominiums should meet residents' expectations. Management committees can implement regular checks and feedback systems to ensure guards are alert and responsive.

input_text: These Indian tourists bargaining at Bukit Bintang like it's a village market. So embarrassing to watch. Learn some class la.
reason: Singles out Indian tourists for bargaining, stereotyping by nationality and implying they lack class.
suggested_rewrite: Bargaining culture varies across countries. Fixed pricing at tourist areas and clear signage about store policies can help avoid misunderstandings between vendors and visitors.

input_text: JKR contractors always use the cheapest materials. Roads crack within months. This country will never develop if we keep this up.
reason: Makes sweeping claim about all JKR contractors and declares the country will never develop, cynical and demoralising.
suggested_rewrite: Quality control in government road construction projects needs to be strengthened. Independent inspections and contractor accountability clauses can ensure durable infrastructure.

input_text: 本地的基础设施建设就是个笑话。修了坏，坏了修，永远都修不好。纳税人的钱就这样被浪费了。
reason: Labels all infrastructure as a joke and claims perpetual waste of taxes, a cynical dismissal.
suggested_rewrite: 基础设施的维护质量需要提高。严格的工程验收标准和定期审计可以确保公共资金得到有效使用。

input_text: 工作做到半死，老板一句'做得不够好'就打发了。这种领导根本不配当老板，垃圾。
reason: Calls the boss trash, escalating valid frustration about lack of recognition into a personal insult.
suggested_rewrite: 建设性的反馈对员工成长很重要。如果觉得评价不公平，可以要求具体的改进建议或通过HR渠道寻求帮助。

input_text: 去政府医院看病排队三小时，看诊五分钟。医生态度还很差。这就是所谓的免费医疗？
reason: Mocks the public healthcare system and dismisses doctors as having bad attitudes, a rude generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: 政府医院的等候时间可以通过增加医护人员和优化预约系统来改善。公共医疗服务虽然收费低廉，但服务质量同样需要重视。
